cross_scene_arcs.title: From Truancy to Injustice
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ben starts by offering to help with a boy's truancy, then witnesses a severe caning injustice at his school, and commits to investigating the boy's disappearance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ben is a concerned churchgoer offering help with a community issue.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ben has committed to investigating Jonathan's disappearance, showing deepened involvement.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jonathan's whereabouts and the injustice he faced.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Seeking Truth for Gordon
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ben investigates Jonathan's disappearance, faces Gordon's demand for truth, visits police, learns of Gordon's alleged suicide, and views his body, believing he was murdered.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ben believes Gordon was murdered and is determined to act on the evidence.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to prove Gordon was murdered and seek justice.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Defying the System
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The court rules Gordon's death a suicide, Ben defies Stolz's blackmail to continue his investigation, and is later hit by Stolz's car.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ben faces a legal defeat in court.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ben is injured after a deliberate assault by Stolz, showing the conflict's escalation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ben's injury and the ongoing threat from Stolz.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Marital Rift
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ben's dedication to the case causes marital strain, leading to an argument where he leaves for Soweto, fracturing the relationship.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ben's marriage is under strain due to his obsession with the case.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ben leaves home for Soweto, and the relationship is severely damaged.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The conflict between Ben's activism and family obligations.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Justice for Jonathan
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Gordon seeks redress for Jonathan's unjust caning, confirms his detention, searches for him in the morgue, and alerts Ben to his disappearance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Son missing, relying on Ben's help
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jonathan's whereabouts and condition remain unknown

cross_scene_arcs.title: Trust in Ben
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Gordon evolves from a deferential employee to confiding in Ben about family injustices and seeking his intervention.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Effectiveness of Ben's assistance in a biased system

cross_scene_arcs.title: State Oppression and Death
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Gordon is arrested, tortured in custody, dies under suspicious circumstances, and his death is officially misrepresented.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Deceased with body showing injuries, inquest upholding police narrative
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Truth of death suppressed, justice denied

cross_scene_arcs.title: Family Strain
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Gordon faces Jonathan's defiance and later supports Emily during her breakdown, highlighting family distress.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing family crisis due to external events

cross_scene_arcs.title: Justice for the Missing and Dead
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stanley actively seeks information on missing persons, learns of deaths like Jonathan's and Gordon's, and persists in investigating with Ben despite escalating risks.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Seeking help at police station for missing persons.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Reaffirming commitment to clear Gordon's name after allies are killed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deepening Bond with Ben in Resistance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stanley's relationship with Ben evolves from delivering grim news to becoming trusted allies, involving shared grief, covert plans, and joint resistance activities.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Informing Ben of Gordon's alleged suicide.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Vowing to continue the investigation together after discussing murdered allies.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Continued surveillance and danger from authorities.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Community Support and Personal Harassment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Stanley supports community members like Paulina, reveals his kinship with Gordon, and endures aggressive police searches, highlighting his role in the collective struggle.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Comforting a woman at the police station.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Retrieving his passbook after a hostile police search at his house.
